title: Garden Route Swim School stars shine with medals at SA Junior Nationals
description: GEORGE NEWS - Garden Route Swim School is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Garden Route Swim School is incredibly proud of two of their swimmers who both achieved their dream of winning a medal at the South African Junior Nationals het at Gqeberha from 25-29 April.


> Isabeau Coetsee (13) brought home a remarkable seven medals and Carlo Bezuidenhout (15) received a gold medal in the 50m freestyle.


Together they racked up an impressive 125 points.

Swim school owner Franna Vorster congratulates both of them, as well as their coach Dirco Nienaber.

“Well done, team GRSS – your hard work, dedication, and determination paid off!”

Isabeau Coetsee’s achievements

- Gold – 50m Fly
- Gold – 200m IM
- Gold – 50m Back
- Silver – 100m Back
- Silver – 100m Fly
- Bronze – 200m Free
- Bronze – 100m Free

Carlo Bezuidenhout (15)

Isabeau Coetsee (13)

Isabeau Coetsee (13) brought home a remarkable seven medals.

Carlo Bezuidenhout (15) received a gold medal in the 50m freestyle.‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
